title: bouvardia lottiae
intro: Bouvardia lottiae, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or orange bouvardia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. Its medicinal properties include the ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and act as a mild expectorant. The health benefits of Bouvardia lottiae include its potential to help with indigestion, diarrhea, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Bouvardia lottiae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
